title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues in a Dwarkesh Patel interview that the ability to invent theories like General Relativity represents a final test of artificial general intelligence. This frames scientific discovery and theoretical innovation as the ultimate measure of AI capability rather than narrower metrics.
